case_title: STEVENSON, ROBERT A. vs. RYAN, GARY G. JR. AN INDIV.& DBA A & R PAINTING CO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEVENSON, ROBERT A. AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, GARY G. JR. AN INDIV.& DBA A & R PAINTING CO
